rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.rationale: Source-domain musicology on sutartines polyphony; one content word matches but it is the source-side term. No LLM mechanism, no KV cache operation. Below all thresholds.

Inter-Layer Attention Similarity for KV cache compression: same artefact (KV cache) and a closely-related primitive — comparing keys across multiple structural units via similarity. Mirrors the dissonance-penalty/cross-subcache comparison primitive of SUTARTINE-KV.
SqueezeAttention performs 2D layer-wise KV budget allocation; same artefact but different operation (budget reallocation, not multi-cache phase-staggered duplication). Just below both 0.7 thresholds.

LMCache shares/duplicates KV cache across engines and queries — a multi-instance KV cache structure functionally adjacent to SUTARTINE-KV's K interleaved sub-caches (multiple coexisting cache copies queried together). Meets both 0.7 thresholds.
Entropy-Guided KV: per-layer entropy-based budgeting. Same artefact but unrelated primitive (entropy-driven retention vs. redundant phase-offset duplication). Below thresholds.
KV cache scheme for diffusion LLMs involves multi-pass/phase-style cache indexing, structurally analogous to phase-staggered sub-caches. Meets 0.7 on both axes.

KVSharer uses Euclidean dissimilarity between layer KV caches to decide sharing — this is a functional twin of SUTARTINE-KV's dissonance penalty (penalising near-duplicate / using distance between caches) combined with multi-cache structure. Strongest match.

Recursion-Wise KV partitions the cache into recursion-organised sub-structures — same artefact (KV cache) with a multi-partition primitive analogous to K interleaved sub-caches. Meets both 0.7 thresholds.

fail_reason: 5 of 8 results trigger the hit rule (sem>=0.7 and/or func>=0.7). The LLM-side mechanism of SUTARTINE-KV — multiple coexisting KV sub-caches with cross-cache similarity/dissimilarity-driven score modulation — is anticipated by prior work: KVSharer (Euclidean dissimilarity between layer KV caches; func=0.82) is a direct functional twin of the dissonance-penalty + multi-cache primitive, and Inter-Layer Attention Similarity (2412.02252), LMCache multi-engine KV sharing, Diffusion-LLM phase-indexed KV, and Recursion-Wise KV partitioning all instantiate the same artefact + multi-partition / cross-cache-similarity primitive cluster. total_hits=5 >= 1 -> FAIL.
